name: Applesauce Meringue
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the rind of 1 Lemon
2. Preheat oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Combine applesauce, lemon juice and grated lemon rind in a bowl.
4. Beat in egg yolks until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a baking dish.
6. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form.
7. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat the egg whites.
8. Add vanilla extract and mix in approximately 1/4 of the beaten egg whites.
9. Spoon the remaining meringue mixture on top of the applesauce.
10. Bake for 15 minutes. Serve hot or cold.
